expected_outcome: Competent Full-Stack JavaScript Developer capable of building responsive React frontends, robust Node/Express backends, structuring databases in MongoDB, and deploying applications.

topics.name: Modern JavaScript & React Intro
subtopics: ES6 features (Destructuring, Spreads, Arrow functions, Modules)

topics.name: State Management & Events
subtopics: useEffect for API calling and cleanup

topics.name: Routing & Context API
subtopics: UseContext for global settings (e.g. auth, dark mode)

phases.practice_schedule: 1.5 Hours daily building small UI widgets and calling external public API endpoints.

mini_project.title: Crypto Tracker Dashboard
mini_project.description: A responsive React SPA using Tailwind CSS that fetches cryptocurrency prices from a public API, displays cards, offers filtering, and stores user favorites in context.

phases.milestone: Mastered React state, lifecycle hooks, styling layouts, and single-page client routing.

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily writing HTTP server routes, custom middlewares, and validating request objects.

mini_project.title: Contact Book REST Service
mini_project.description: An Express backend with full CRUD operations to manage personal contacts, complete with body validation and query parameter filters.

phases.milestone: Proficient in designing web servers, custom middlewares, route groupings, and returning structured API responses.

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily mapping collections, configuring references, and setting up auth controllers.

mini_project.title: Secure Diary API
mini_project.description: An Express REST API linked to MongoDB where users register, log in to receive a JWT, and create password-protected diary logs.

phases.milestone: Mastered MongoDB collections, relationships, encryption hashing, and authorization endpoints.

topics.name: Connecting Frontend & Backend
subtopics: Handling HTTP requests with Axios / Fetch

phases.practice_schedule: 2.5 Hours daily building full-stack dashboards, connecting databases, and testing hosting configurations.

mini_project.title: MERN Task Board (Trello clone)
mini_project.description: A full-stack project where users organize tasks in columns (Todo, Doing, Done) with accounts, updates saving to MongoDB, and drag-drop UI support.

phases.milestone: Fully competent MERN stack developer able to build secure database projects and host them live.

major_projects.title: E-Commerce Web Application
major_projects.description: A MERN application featuring user auth, product searches and filters, shopping cart persistency, checkout system integration, and an administrator panel to manage inventory and view user order reports.

major_projects.title: Collaborative Real-time Blog Platform
major_projects.description: A blog website with account authentication, markdown rendering for posts, dynamic comments and liking functionality, tags categorization, and real-time dashboard analytics tracking post views.
